question.text:
Dear Kieran san

 

Thank you for your response.

Could you advise us how to manually refresh the DDS calculation?

The bookings are already restored.

I tried to input the MT date directly, but I couldn’t.




 

Best regards,

 

Saori IWATA

EQC/Operation – As agents for CU LINES

Ben Line Agencies – Tokyo, Japan

Tel +81 3 6718 0741

saori.iwata@benline.com <mail

www.benlineagencies.com <http://www.benlineagencies.com/> 

 


Cc: Document Center1 <documentcenter1@culines.com>; Chris X

answer.text:
Dear Saoli,

You can click the “Manual Calculation” button to refresh. Already done for CULVNGO2600109.


Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆
